response.overview: A monster hides across the street, mimicking human silhouettes through apartment windows. Its presence is still, patient, and watching. Those who get too close to the glass risk encountering something unnatural, as the line between observer and observed begins to blur. Even from the safety of small apartment room, a shadow hints at a presence that lingers in the night, waiting for the next unwary glimpse.
response.tagline: A monster that mimics human silhouettes through apartment windows, preying on those who get too close to the glass.
response.title: Window Watcher
